title: New war, same weakness: when will Europe learn?
summary_full: Given its lack of real leverage, Europe has little choice but to hope that the US and Israel swiftly degrade Iran's military capacity and create the conditions for benign regime change
summary_public: Given its lack of real leverage, Europe has little choice but to hope that the US and Israel swiftly degrade Iran's military capacity and create the conditions for benign regime change

IL.label: neutral
IL.evidence: hope that the US and Israel swiftly degrade Iran's military capacity

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: degrade Iran's military capacity and create the conditions for benign regime change
